name: Packet Swap
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>強</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>制</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>切</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>断</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 face-up non-Link Monster you control and 1 Link Monster your opponent controls; switch control of those monsters. You can only activate 1 "Packet Swap" per turn.
eff: Target 1 face-up non-Link Monster you control and 1 Link Monster your opponent controls; switch control of those monsters. You can only activate 1 "Packet Swap" per turn.

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
